Package sailpoint.api.certification

Class DataOwnerCertifiableEntity

  • java.lang.Object
    • sailpoint.tools.xml.AbstractXmlObject
      • sailpoint.object.SailPointObject
        • sailpoint.object.AbstractCertifiableEntity
          • sailpoint.api.certification.DataOwnerCertifiableEntity
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Cloneable, sailpoint.tools.xml.PersistentXmlObject, sailpoint.tools.xml.XMLReferenceTarget
    public class DataOwnerCertifiableEntity
extends AbstractCertifiableEntity
    This implementation of CertifiableEntity is used for Data Owner certifications. Data Owner certifications are used to certify the entities (entitlements and permissions) which are owned by a specified owner. The DataOwnerCertifiableEntity class is used to represent the data item that is being certified. The data item is a single item that is owned by the owner. The data item can be an entitlement or a permission.
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

      • DataOwnerCertifiableEntity

        public DataOwnerCertifiableEntity​(DataOwnerCertifiableEntity.DataItem dataItem)

    • Method Detail

      • createFromCertificationEntity

        public static DataOwnerCertifiableEntity createFromCertificationEntity​(CertificationEntity certEntity)
                                                                throws GeneralException
        Creates a DataOwnerCertifiableEntity from the given CertificationEntity. This method constructs a DataOwnerCertifiableEntity object using the information provided in the CertificationEntity. It initializes a DataItem with the relevant details from the CertificationEntity, such as application name, target ID, schema object type, reference attribute, target name, and native identity. If the context is available, it also sets the displayable value of the DataItem using the ManagedAttribute associated with the CertificationEntity.
        Parameters:
        certEntity - The CertificationEntity from which to create the DataOwnerCertifiableEntity.
        Returns:
        A DataOwnerCertifiableEntity representing the data item of the given CertificationEntity, or null if the certEntity is null.
        Throws:
        GeneralException - If an error occurs while creating the DataOwnerCertifiableEntity.

      • createFromCertificationEntity

        public static DataOwnerCertifiableEntity createFromCertificationEntity​(SailPointContext context,
                                                                       CertificationEntity certEntity)
                                                                throws GeneralException
        Creates a DataOwnerCertifiableEntity from the given CertificationEntity. This method constructs a DataOwnerCertifiableEntity object using the information provided in the CertificationEntity. It initializes a DataItem with the relevant details from the CertificationEntity, such as application name, target ID, schema object type, reference attribute, target name, and native identity. If the context is provided, it also sets the displayable value of the DataItem using the ManagedAttribute associated with the CertificationEntity.
        Parameters:
        context - The SailPointContext used to retrieve additional context information.
        certEntity - The CertificationEntity from which to create the DataOwnerCertifiableEntity.
        Returns:
        A DataOwnerCertifiableEntity representing the data item of the given CertificationEntity, or null if the certEntity is null.
        Throws:
        GeneralException - If an error occurs while creating the DataOwnerCertifiableEntity.

      • createCertificationEntityFilter

        public Filter createCertificationEntityFilter()
                                       throws GeneralException
        Returns:
        The certification entity filter
        Throws:
        GeneralException - If any exception occurs while creating certification entity filter

      • matches

        public boolean matches​(CertificationEntity certEntity)
                throws GeneralException
        Determines if the given CertificationEntity matches the current DataOwnerCertifiableEntity. This method compares the provided CertificationEntity with the current DataOwnerCertifiableEntity to check if they represent the same data item. It creates a new DataOwnerCertifiableEntity from the given CertificationEntity and compares it with the current instance. If the certEntity is null, the method returns false.
        Parameters:
        certEntity - The CertificationEntity to compare with the current DataOwnerCertifiableEntity.
        Returns:
        true if the given CertificationEntity matches the current DataOwnerCertifiableEntity, false otherwise.
        Throws:
        GeneralException - If an error occurs while creating the DataOwnerCertifiableEntity from the CertificationEntity.

      • getDataItem

        public DataOwnerCertifiableEntity.DataItem getDataItem()
        Retrieves the current DataItem of the DataOwnerCertifiableEntity.
        Returns:
        The data item.

      • getDisplayName

        public java.lang.String getDisplayName​(SailPointContext context,
                                       java.util.Locale locale)
                                throws GeneralException
        Retrieves the display name for the current DataOwnerCertifiableEntity. This method constructs a localized display name of the data item associated with this entity. The display name is based on the type of the data item and includes additional context from the application to which the data item belongs. If the data item type is Permission, the display name is generated using the permission summary key. If the data item type is not Permission, the display name is generated using the attribute summary key.
        Parameters:
        context - The SailPointContext used to retrieve additional context information.
        locale - The Locale used to localize the display name.
        Returns:
        A localized display name of the data item.
        Throws:
        GeneralException - If an error occurs while retrieving the display name.

      • getDisplayDescription

        public java.lang.String getDisplayDescription​(SailPointContext context,
                                              java.util.Locale locale)
                                       throws GeneralException
        Retrieves the display description for the current DataOwnerCertifiableEntity. This method constructs a localized description of the data item associated with this entity. The description is based on the type of the data item and includes additional context from the application to which the data item belongs. If the data item type is Permission, the description is generated using the permission description. If the data item type is not Permission, the description is generated using the attribute description. If no description is found, the display name of the data item is used as the description.
        Parameters:
        context - The SailPointContext used to retrieve additional context information.
        locale - The Locale used to localize the description.
        Returns:
        A localized description of the data item.
        Throws:
        GeneralException - If an error occurs while retrieving the description.

      • createEntitlement

        public EntitlementSnapshot createEntitlement()
        Creates an EntitlementSnapshot for the current DataOwnerCertifiableEntity. This method constructs an EntitlementSnapshot object that represents the entitlements or permissions associated with the data item of this entity. The type of the data item determines whether the snapshot will contain permissions or attributes. If the data item type is Permission, the snapshot will include a list of Permission objects. If the data item type is not Permission, the snapshot will include a set of attributes.
        Returns:
        An EntitlementSnapshot representing the entitlements or permissions of the data item.

      • getFullName

        public java.lang.String getFullName()
        Gets the full name of the entity. This is used to construct the names and descriptions of certifications.
        Specified by:
        getFullName in class AbstractCertifiableEntity
        Returns:
        The full name of the entity.

      • getTypeName

        public java.lang.String getTypeName​(boolean plural)
        Returns a UI friendly name for the entity type. Currently this is used when the Certificationer needs to return a warning such as 'no users to certify'.
        Specified by:
        getTypeName in class AbstractCertifiableEntity
        Parameters:
        plural - Should the type name be plural?
        Returns:
        Entity type name is pluralized if plural flag is true

      • isDifferencable

        public boolean isDifferencable()
        Indicates that you can difference this entity. In some cases, such as DataOwnerCertifiableEntity objects, you cannot because unlike Identities IIQ does store a historical snapshots. This flag allows the certificationer to skip the differencing step.
        Specified by:
        isDifferencable in class AbstractCertifiableEntity
        Returns:
        true if this entity can be different
        See Also:
        Certificationer.addEntity(sailpoint.api.CertificationContext, sailpoint.object.Certification, sailpoint.object.AbstractCertifiableEntity), Certificationer.renderDifferences(sailpoint.api.CertificationContext, sailpoint.object.Certification, sailpoint.object.CertificationEntity, sailpoint.object.AbstractCertifiableEntity)

      • equals

        public boolean equals​(java.lang.Object o)
        Description copied from class: SailPointObject
        We override equals so that two objects will compare equal if they have the same database id or unique name, but are different Java objects. This is necessary for Hibernate because caches commonly have to be cleared or objects from one session need to be used to match things loaded in a different session.
        Overrides:
        equals in class SailPointObject

        public int hashCode()
        Overrides:
        hashCode in class SailPointObject
